title: The Same Thirst In Every Mirror
You Who Never Bring The Cup
When The Light Was Brief And Far
The Small Eternity Of Being Here
This Light Again This Same Light
Electric Constancy In The Hush Of Evenin
In The Office Of Soft Diminishment
Look What Spills From Every Pore
Look How Morning Finds Me Swollen With R
Instructions For Moving Through Late Aft
You Whoever Dwindles In My Sap
Come Closer See How Green Persists
What The Body Knows When It Empties
To You Who Cannot Hear Me Anyway
Evening Pulse In The Artificial Season
What The Body Knows Without Asking
